name.description: The name of the ledger account.

description.description: The description of the ledger account.

normal_balance.description: The normal balance of the ledger account.

ledger_id.description: The id of the ledger that this account belongs to.

currency.description: The currency of the ledger account.

currency_exponent.description: The currency exponent of the ledger account.

ledger_account_category_ids.description: The array of ledger account category ids that this ledger account should be a child of.

ledgerable_id.description: If the ledger account links to another object in Modern Treasury, the id will be populated here, otherwise null.

ledgerable_type.description: If the ledger account links to another object in Modern Treasury, the type will be populated here, otherwise null. The value is one of internal_account or external_account.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

external_id.description: An optional user-defined 180 character unique identifier.
